programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: The Spy Next Door
programme.desc: Former CIA spy takes on his toughest assignment to date: looking after his girlfriend's three kids.

programme.title: Hudson
programme.desc: After his mother's death, Hudson, a reclusive but charming man, embarks on a journey with his distant cousin to scatter his mother's ashes in the Hudson Valley region of New York.

programme.title: Management
programme.desc: A traveling art saleswoman (Jennifer Aniston) tries to shake off a flaky motel manager who falls for her and won't leave her alone.

programme.title: Clairevoyant
programme.desc: A yoga-practicing girl hires a TV crew to document her journey to enlightenment to self-discovery, comparing the past, her painful present, and the unspiritual scene in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E14 Stark Raving Mad - The spies' old nemesis, Mr. Sebastian, is holding extreme underground raves in Beverly Hills. At the raves, his specially engineered music is inciting the ravers to destroy whatever venue they are having the rave in or at.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Barbie: Dreamtopia is an all-new magical, make-believe world imagined by Chelsea, Barbie's youngest sister. Join Chelsea and her puppy Honey as they swim through rainbow rivers with beautiful mermaids and fly through cotton candy clouds with fairies.

programme.title: Ghosthunters: On Icy Trails
programme.desc: When the often-fearful eleven-year-old Tom discovers a slimy green ghost in his cellar called Hugo, he is understandably afraid. However, Tom soon realises that Hugo, who is an ASG (Averagely Spooky Ghost), is not only completely harmless but also desperately in need of his help.

programme.title: Postman Pat: The Movie
programme.desc: Postman Pat, a mail carrier, lives an idyllic life in the quaint British town of Greendale. When a national talent TV show comes to town, Pat enters. But when he comes face-to-face with the temptations of money – can he resist?

programme.title: R.A.D.A.R.: The Adventures of the Bionic Dog
programme.desc: A boy and his dog with bionic powers save a small town from two bumbling crooks.

programme.title: Crisis Point
programme.desc: (2012) Thriller with Rhona Mitra. Still haunted by a failed negotiation, a psychologist is thrust back into high-stakes action when her sister is taken hostage, forcing her to face her greatest fears.

programme.title: Lone Rider
programme.desc: (2008) Gutsy western starring Lou Diamond Phillips. A decorated soldier returning home after the American Civil War finds that an evil land owner has taken over the town.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: (1946) Western with Randolph Scott, Edgar Buchanan and Lloyd Bridges. As tensions build between unruly cattlemen and determined homesteaders in post-Civil War Kansas, can one man keep the peace?

programme.title: The Commando
programme.desc: When a DEA agent returns home from a botched mission to recover, he has to save his family from a violent criminal and his gang who has invaded his home. Starring Michael Jai White (2022)

programme.title: Match Point
programme.desc: A former tennis pro falls for an actress who happens to be dating his friend and soon-to-be brother-in-law. Starring Scarlett Johansson (2005)

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: Everything is running smoothly for popular radio DJ Dr. Emma Lloyd in the run up to her own wedding when she makes the shocking discovery: she's already married – and to someone else!

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner's deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: Shattered Earth. Cloudy Mountain
programme.desc: A peaceful town turns into a living hell when a devastating earthquake is triggered, causing buildings to tumble and sinkholes to open. A retired railway soldier and his son, an explosives engineer, travel deep into a cave to rescue trapped survivors.

programme.title: Nocebo
programme.desc: A fashion designer (Eva Green) suffers from a mysterious illness that confounds her doctors and frustrates her husband (Mark Strong) - until help arrives in the form of a Filipino nanny (Chai Fonacier) who uses traditional folk healing to reveal a horrifying truth.

programme.title: The Archer
programme.desc: Imprisoned in a reform camp Lauren befriends Rebecca and together they manage to escape its unsafe environs into the wilds of Utah where they must fight for their lives.

programme.title: Twist Of Fate
programme.desc: Grieving over the untimely loss of his family and in a dissociative state, an aimlessly-wandering Jewish man is rescued by another family who help him find his way back to happiness again.

programme.title: Five Minutes to Live
programme.desc: Selepas rompakan bank mereka berlaku dengan teruk, seorang penjenayah ganas dan pasukannya mengambil isteri pengarah bank sebagai tebusan.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: A mentally-disturbed spinster experiences a series of bizarre encounters in Rome as she searches for someone she feels she'll know--when she finds him. AKA Identikit

programme.title: Berlin I Love You
programme.desc: Latest instalment of the Cities of Love series (Paris, je t'aime / New York, I Love You / Rio, Eu Te Amo), this collective feature film is made of ten stories of romance set in the German capital.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace becomes a princess when a summer trip to Paris turns into the fantasy of a lifetime.

programme.title: Dreamin Wild
programme.desc: What if a childhood dream suddenly came true - but thirty years later? That's what happened to singer/songwriter Donnie Emerson. His dream of success suddenly – and unexpectedly – came true but only as he approached 50 years old.

programme.title: Street Kings
programme.desc: When evidence implicates a veteran LAPD cop in the execution of a fellow officer, he is forced to go up against the cop culture he's been a part of his entire career.

programme.title: Get Shorty
programme.desc: Golden Globe® winner John Travolta stars with Gene Hackman, Danny DeVito and Rene Russo in this wildly popular comedy of a gangster who turns into a big-time producer after he travels to Hollywood to collect a debt from a down-and-out filmmaker.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Banished by the king, Hercules harnesses his powers and gathers an army to fight his way back to his kingdom.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Caught between the worlds of the supernatural and human, Hellboy battles an ancient sorceress bent on revenge.

programme.title: Horns
programme.desc: After his girlfriend's mysterious death, a young man awakens to find strange horns sprouting from his forehead

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter is all that stands between humanity and the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: The Way
programme.desc: Martin Sheen plays Tom, an American doctor who comes to France to collect the remains of his adult son who was killed in the Pyrenees in a storm while walking The Camino de Santiago - also known as 'The Way of Saint James'. Driven by his desire to understand his lost son, Tom decides to embark on the historical pilgrimage, leaving his California life behind. Armed only with his son's backpack and guidebook, he begins the 800km historical pilgrimage but soon discovers that he won't be alone on this journey - he meets other pilgrims from around the world, all broken and looking for greater meaning in their lives. From the hardship experienced along "The Way" an unlikely group of misfits are bonded and Tom begins to learn the difference between 'The life we live and the life we choose.'

programme.title: The World's Fastest Indian
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins stars as Burt Munro, a man who never let the dreams of youth fade. After a lifetime of perfecting his classic Indian motorcycle, Burt set off from the bottom of the world to test his bike at the Bonneville Salt Flats in Utah. With all the odds against him, he set a new speed record and captured the spirit of his times. Burt Munro's 1967 world record remains unbroken and his legend lives on today.

programme.title: It Follows
programme.desc: For 19-year-old Jay (Maika Monroe), the fall should be about school, boys and weekends out at the lake. But after a seemingly innocent sexual encounter, she finds herself plagued by strange visions and the inescapable sense that someone, or something, is following her. Faced with this burden, Jay and her teenage friends must find a way to escape the horrors that seem to be only a few steps behind.

programme.title: Adventures of a Taxi Driver
programme.desc: Joe likes the ladies and gets to meet a variety of them in his job as a taxi driver. From dizzy young women to frustrated housewives, Joe fancies them all, and they take a fancy to Joe. If only things were smoother at home for the put-upon cabbie. With his nagging mother, thieving teenage brother, and the attentions of an overbearing girlfriend with ideas of marriage, Joe leaves the homestead and rents the spare room at his best mate's flat. Meanwhile, he continues to find himself in an assortment of humorous sexual escapades until he accidentally becomes embroiled in a jewel heist that doesn't quite go to plan.

programme.title: Entanglement
programme.desc: A charmingly quirky romantic comedy with a twist! While searching for the meaning of his existence, Ben Layton (Thomas Middleditch: Silicon Valley) uncovers a family secret that leads him to a woman named Hanna (Jess Weixler: The Good Wife) who might have almost been his adopted sister. But when he and Hanna inadvertently fall in love, his life becomes increasingly and weirdly complicated. Epic!

programme.title: The Last Witness
programme.desc: BAFTA Award Nominee Piotr Szkopiak directs this unmissable political thriller, based on the harrowing true events of the Katyn Massacre in Spring 1940. While investigating a spate of suicides by resettled Polish soldiers, ambitious journalist Stephen (Alex Pettyfer) is embroiled in a dangerous conspiracy concerning the execution of 22,000 Polish military and civilians by Stalin's secret police.

programme.title: In The Line of Duty
programme.desc: Buckle up for intense against-the-clock action, starring Aaron Eckhart (The Dark Knight) and from the producers of John Wick. Disgraced cop Frank is on a mission to find the Chief of Police (Giancarlo Esposito: Breaking Bad)s abducted daughter. After killing the abductor, all hell breaks loose when the abductors brother (Ben McKenzie: Gotham) arrives thirsty for revenge.

programme.title: Discarnate
programme.desc: The producer of Independence Day: Resurgence brings you this spine-tingling descent into the supernatural. A grieving neuro-scientist creates a mind-altering serum that reconnects people to the other side. However it unknowingly attracts a more sinister being. This mind-bending horror stars Thomas Kretschmann (King Kong) Josh Stewart (Interstellar) and Bex Taylor-Klaus (TVs Scream).

programme.title: Hint of Love
programme.desc: A cookbook literary agent with culinary training is tasked with helping elevate the brand of a food channel personality known for his convenience-oriented recipes. However, as the agent works with her client on a new cookbook, she must choose between following the directions or her heart.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: A self-absorbed realtor enlists the help of his neighbor when he's suddenly left in charge of the granddaughter he never knew existed until his estranged son drops her off at his home.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: Forever In My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs—back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Save the Date
programme.desc: Lizzy Caplan and Alison Brie star in a romantic comedy about 2 very different sisters, and their adventures in love, lust and a race to the altar.

programme.title: A Random Encounter
programme.desc: What seems to be a chance encounter one day at a coffee shop leads to a full-fledged romance, but the couple must fight for their relationship to survive the craziness that is show business. Starring: Meghan Markle, Sean Young, Michael Rady

programme.title: Love on the Side
programme.desc: A small-town waitress vies with a sassy city slicker for the attention of the town's most eligible bachelor.

programme.title: Sweet Home Carolina
programme.desc: Diane is a struggling single mom in LA. Just when things are at their worst, but she will have to live in small town USA for a year and take care of a dog for a year before the house is hers.

programme.title: Dance-Off
programme.desc: "Dance-Off" tells the story of two rival dance studios whose star-crossed lovers, Brandon and Jasmine, must compete against each other for $25,000 and the top award, the Platinum Platinum.

programme.title: Finding Grace
programme.desc: A troubled teenage girl is forced to provide community service in a retirement home. As she develops a friendship with one of the residents and becomes closer to her father, she discovers the power of family, hope and faith.

programme.title: Cinderella in the Caribbean
programme.desc: Ashlyn Vanderbilt travels with her stepmother Miriam and her fiancé Bruce for their destination wedding. Although Ashlyn finds friendship and love with Bruce's son, Noah, she struggles to have her happily ever after when she discovers that her stepfamily plans to ruin Bruce.

programme.title: After The Storm
programme.desc: Lauren wants to rebuild her community, including her family home, in the aftermath of a devastatingly disastrous storm.

programme.title: Love, Lost & Found
programme.desc: Claire gets a surprise proposal on a mountain hike with her boyfriend Joey but when they get separated, a rancher turns Claire's head and a park ranger makes Joey see they're made for each other.

programme.title: Runaway Romance
programme.desc: Reality TV star Ann Stanway leaves Hollywood and finds herself in Amish country where she discovers friendship, new love and ultimately herself. In the end, Ann must decide between staying in her newfound reality or returning to her old one.

programme.title: Hidden Family Secrets
programme.desc: Melanie and her daughter are adjusting to life after husband and dad Scott died.

programme.title: A House on Fire
programme.desc: Deborah had the epitome of a perfect life. But not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: Next Door Nightmare
programme.desc: Sarah and Kyle move next door to a charismatic, but deeply disturbed psychopath.

programme.title: Darren and Chastity / Ryan / Julie
programme.desc: A family is subjected to a vicious attack during a brutal home invasion.

programme.title: Hidden Family Secrets
programme.desc: Melanie and her daughter are adjusting to life after husband and dad Scott died.

programme.title: The Bad Son
programme.desc: An elusive serial killer is killing innocent women in Seattle. The police and FBI are on the killer's trail but were never prepared to face a bizarre twist in the case.

programme.title: A Lethal Lesson
programme.desc: High school teacher Lauren is accused of an affair by a student, putting her job and life in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Perfect Soulmate
programme.desc: A poet with an abusive husband reaches out to a fan for help, only to find an even more dangerous companion.

programme.title: Killer Reputation
programme.desc: A PR maven takes pride in her reputation, but she risks it to help a star accused of killing his ex-wife.

programme.title: A Friend's Obsession
programme.desc: After Megan's fiancé is killed, Lloyd follows her to win her love, but her new boyfriend stands in the way.

programme.title: Another You
programme.desc: ANOTHER YOU is the uproarious slapstick comedy about a pathological liar who, upon his release from a mental clinic, becomes involved with a con man and ends up impersonating a billionaire. Scam follows double-scam in classic Pryor/Wilder style. Features Academy Award winner Mercedes Ruehl as a con who falls for Gene Wilder.

programme.title: Stripes (1981)
programme.desc: Bill Murray and Harold Ramis as bootcamp flatfoots who join the Army to meet girls and actually succeed. Mud wrestling will never be the same.

programme.title: Stripes (1981)
programme.desc: Bill Murray and Harold Ramis as bootcamp flatfoots who join the Army to meet girls and actually succeed. Mud wrestling will never be the same.

programme.title: Gigli
programme.desc: When small time street thug Larry Gigli meets a tough and gorgeous enforcer named Ricki, the sparks fly in this outrageous battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Seven Alone
programme.desc: A frontier family crosses the U.S. by wagon train, hoping for a better life in the Oregon Territory.

programme.title: Django... Adios!
programme.desc: Django, a former federal sheriff, is arrested for allegedly stealing a chest full of dollars that was earmarked for the construction of a school and church in Silver City.

programme.title: Dig Your Grave Friend... Sabata's Coming
programme.desc: Steve McGowan returns from the Civil War to find his father murdered by the ruthless landowner Miller. Seeking revenge, Steve joins forces with the bandit Pompero. Things take a turn when they capture Helen, Miller's fiancée. With the deadly gunslinger Sabata now hunting them, alliances are tested, and the fight for justice intensifies.

programme.title: Raise Your Hands, Dead Man, You're Under Arrest
programme.desc: The sole survivor, named Sando Kid (Peter Lee Lawrence), of a massacre in the North seeks revenge. After suffering the atrocity, the Kid executes a solo revenge, razes, beats and kills everyone involved in the massacre.

programme.title: The Star Packer
programme.desc: A gang working for The Shadow is terrorizing the town. John Travers decides to take on the job of sheriff and do something about it.

programme.title: Heavens Above!
programme.desc: Amanda occasionally baby-sits for friends and neighbors, so when the newly-arrived couple in the village ask her to sit for them, she accepts.

programme.title: THE SECRET PLACE
programme.desc: When a temperamental opera star finds out her husband is accused of murder she sets off to find the real killer and is determined to prove her husbands innocence. As she comes closer to the truth, she also comes closer to danger.

programme.title: Twenty-One Days
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier and Vivien Leigh star in a tale of murder and unforeseen consequences.

programme.title: Passage Home
programme.desc: ‚ÄòLucky Ryland‚Äô is the captain of the ‚ÄòBulinga‚Äô ship. He secures a contract to transport a cargo of pedigree bulls from South America to England which must be done in record time.

programme.title: I AM HERE (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: A hot-blooded investigator vs. an outraged murderer. The extreme chase between two men entangled in cruel fate begins! He returned to the front lines of investigation and was tracking down a serial killer Kyu-jong. In the process, he finds out through the donation coordinator Ah-seung that Kyu-jong got an organ transplant from the same donor as himself and that the donor was a murderer he arrested himself in the past... Seon-du, the police investigator was once stabbed in his lungs while hunting down a murderer but was miraculously brought back to life through an organ transplant.

programme.title: The Fox Family (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: A story of a family who are kumiho(nine-tailed) foxes in human form. They are looking for a chance to eat a fresh human liver to be turned back into humans.

programme.title: Unframed (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: An omnibus film project, written and directed by four actors exploring new possibilities outside the frame, capturing moments of life, family and relationships.

programme.title: Killing Talk
programme.desc: Jae-pil, who runs a karaoke, has been receiving anonymous blackmails. One day, he gets into a fight with his friend Dae-hyun and ends up knocking him unconscious. Then he receives another text. It says the blackmailer will release the video of him killing Dae-hyun if he refuses to follow his orders. The order is to find one of his customers, Choi Sang- cheol, and kill him in time.

programme.title: A Day
programme.desc: A world-famous father gets stuck in a loop as he continues to fail to save his daughter only to find that this phenomenon is related to his past.

programme.title: Idol
programme.desc: A car accident triggered everything. The secret is bound to connect two men's lives in a harrowing way.

programme.title: My Punch-Drunk Boxer
programme.desc: A former professional boxer who has been diagnosed with punch-drunk syndrome tries to revive his boxing career.

programme.title: Ten Months
programme.desc: Mi-rae a twentysomething game engineer finds out that the hangover was actually her body being pregnant.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: In the future, a man with access to people's memories finds his life at risk when he discovers a dark secret.

programme.title: Flight 7500
programme.desc: A flight from Los Angeles to Tokyo is rocked by turbulence—and a terrifying force is unleashed in this spine-chilling journey into fear from the director of The Grudge.

programme.title: Tomorrow's Game
programme.desc: On the day of his Uncle's ascendance into the Hall of Fame, Daniel is forced to embark on a journey through time that sees him restore his family's legacy and rewrite baseball history.

programme.title: Lost in the Pacific
programme.desc: A luxury airline is making its maiden flight, with a group of VIP passengers on board, when disaster strikes. A mechanical failure forces the plane to crash land and it ends up on a remote Pacific island where passengers and crew must wait to be rescued.

programme.title: Devil's Gate (Abduction)
programme.desc: Set in the small town of Devil's Gate, North Dakota, the film examines the disappearance of a local woman and her young son. Schull plays an FBI agent who helps the local sheriff search for answers.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: All That Glitters
programme.desc: (2014) Detective drama with Lori Loughlin. Thrifty shopper and amateur sleuth Jennifer sifts through sparkly clues when the owner of a storage unit full of antique items is murdered.

programme.title: Mystery 101: An Education in Murder
programme.desc: Mystery starring Jill Wagner. When a young writer reopens an old case, a determined professor races to prove her colleague's innocence - before the truth is buried for good.

programme.title: Lost Letter Mysteries: To The Altar
programme.desc: (2016) Mystery drama with Eric Mabius. Before Rita and Norman's wedding, the postal detectives work to reunite a mother and daughter, as well as delivering a lost wedding dress.

programme.title: Trigger Point
programme.desc: (2015) Thriller starring Jordan Hinson. After her father is laid off, a passionate college student joins activists to stop a corporation from ruining more lives.

programme.title: Deadly Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: (2011) Identity-switch thriller with Charisma Carpenter. When an accident leaves her twin in a coma, Callie sees an opportunity to evade a drug charge by taking her place. But not everyone is fooled..

programme.title: Donovan's Echo
programme.desc: Donovan Matheson is a man trapped in the past. Once an esteemed physicist, he worked on the Manhattan Project but in the years that followed, he became engulfed in regret, which soon turned into an obsession with finding a way to use his work to do good.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Full of shock turns, moments of horrific injury, polar bear action and tense emotional scenes, Arctic will keep your hands clenched to your chair until its brilliant, breathless conclusion.

programme.title: The Baker
programme.desc: A hitman's new rural life is threatened when his old bosses come to town. An action-packed comedy starring Damian Lewis.

programme.title: Gosford Park
programme.desc: In 2001, Robert Altman (MASH, The Long Goodbye) took the unexpected step into Agatha Christie territory with Gosford Park, a murder-mystery whodunit set in an English country house starring a host of British acting greats and with an Oscar-winning screenplay by Downton Abbey creator Julian Fellowes.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A symbologist is caught in an ancient web of secrecy and uncovers the truth about The Holy Grail.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: The team behind the global phenomenon The Da Vinci Code returns for the highly anticipated Angels & Demons, based upon the bestselling novel by Dan Brown. Tom Hanks reprises his role as Harvard symbologist Robert Langdon, who once again finds that forces with ancient roots are willing to stop at nothing, even murder, to advance their goals

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: Meek's Cutoff
programme.desc: In this acclaimed Western, travelling settlers find themselves stranded in harsh conditions and begin to turn upon each other.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: Rules Don't Apply
programme.desc: An aspiring young actress and her ambitious young driver struggle hopefully with the absurd eccentricities of the wildly unpredictable billionaire Howard Hughes, for whom they work.

programme.title: Fireflies in the Garden
programme.desc: The Taylor family is devastated by an accident that takes place on the day their matriarch is due to graduate from college.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: Set in 1903, Tracker is a tense action thriller in which Arjan (Ray Winstone), a guerrilla survivor of the South African Boer War, lands in colonial New Zealand and is promised a huge bounty to capture Kereama (Temuera Morrison), a Maori seafarer accused of killing a British soldier.

programme.title: Supercell
programme.desc: Aspiring storm-chaser William is determined to continue his father's legacy by chasing the most dangerous supercell tornado ever seen.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: DRIVE is the story of a Hollywood stunt driver by day (Ryan Gosling), a loner by nature, who moonlights as a top-notch getaway driver-for-hire in the criminal underworld. He finds himself a target for some of LA's most dangerous men after agreeing to aid the husband of his beautiful neighbour.
